criteria.reason: The existing-report branch runs before AVI conversion, TRIBE cache, TRIBE execution, decoder, and report rebuild stages.
Skipped reports are appended to processed_reports, assigned to final_report_file, and therefore included by the existing batch ZIP loop.
The skip branch continues inside the existing per-video try/finally, so progress advances by file_index / total_inputs.
When the report ZIP is missing or empty, the code falls through to the unchanged TRIBE cache and processing path.
Notebook compile, source checks, and diff hygiene checks passed.
